facebook.caption: Tucked inside a lively market area in Phu Quoc, Lemon Queen has earned a loyal following, and one visit makes it easy to see why. With a solid 4.5 out of 5 stars across 737 reviews, this little kiosk punches well above its size. Stop by to browse local goods, soak up the buzzing atmosphere, and pick up something you won't find back home. Practical tip: arrive early for the best selection and shorter queues.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the colour and energy of Lemon Queen come to life. Shoppers weaving through stalls, fresh finds stacked up, smiles all around. This is the kind of market stop that turns into a highlight of your whole trip to Phu Quoc.

instagram.caption: 4.5 stars, 737 reviews, and a whole lot of charm. Lemon Queen at the market in Phu Quoc is the kind of spot locals love and visitors remember. Go early, go curious.
instagram.video_caption: Bright stalls, busy hands, great finds. Lemon Queen is giving all the right market vibes in Phu Quoc and the crowd of happy shoppers says everything.

tiktok.caption: This little kiosk in Phu Quoc has 737 fans and counting. Lemon Queen is a must-stop. #PhuQuoc #VietnamTravel #MarketFinds #HiddenGem
